title: Encrypted Equipment
body:
S: I’m finishing up some additional work on the encrypted PC equipment.

C: Thanks, I will feel safer about digging and shipping this stuff out once I know my equipment isn’t logging everything I do.

S: Even after the broad security sweep of the museum, Alora has no idea who we are or that we’re working down here.

C: District six was a major hotzone after the security director things so even if we’re in a low population instance, I don’t feel truly safe from prying eyes.

S: Don’t be too paranoid, we aren’t here for much longer anyways.

‎
